About Me

What I am all about.

A Filipino working in IT, residing in Melbourne AU.


I currently work as a Software Developer in Test / Consultant for Planit Testing.


I have over 12 years of experience in Software Development, and over 6 years in Automated UI Testing.


I do music for fun. I am the vocalist and one of the composers/producers for the band Tito Science


I do cycling, running, and jiujitsu.

Experience

16 years in IT.

Projects

Stuff I've been working on.

Active

t2vi

Welcome to my digital playground—a blog where all my passions collide. From hardware hacks and software tinkering, to cycling, jiujitsu, running, and the music that fuels it all—this is where curiosity meets chaos. It’s part tech journal, part training log, part life-in-progress. Dive in, geek out, and maybe get inspired along the way.

music
tech
fitness

Active

Tito Science

Tito Science is what happens when middle-aged chaos meets musical ambition. Born from jam sessions, late-night ideas, and way too much caffeine, we mix rock, funk, and a bit of weirdness—because why not? We're not here to chase trends, just good vibes, loud sounds, and the occasional existential crises in odd time.

music
band

Inactive

Late Bloomer Cycling

A passion project born on two wheels, our cycling blog was a fun ride with friends across the Philippines—sharing routes, stories, and the occasional crash (mostly ego). It eventually came to a halt when I moved to Australia, but the memories (and saddle sores) live on.

music
band

Defunct

Titojutsu

We were a small BJJ clothing store built with passion for the sport and the community. Unfortunately, due to supplier issues, we had to close shop. We’re proud of what we created and grateful for everyone who supported us along the way. Oss! 👊

sports
fitness
